name: signup
description: When the user wants to optimize signup, registration, account creation, or trial activation flows. Also use when the user mentions "signup conversions," "registration friction," "signup form optimization," "free trial signup," "reduce signup dropoff," "account creation flow," "people aren't signing up," "signup abandonment," "trial conversion rate," "nobody completes registration," "too many steps to sign up," or "simplify our signup." Use this whenever the user has a signup or registration flow
author: coreyhaines31
summary_zh: 一款专用于优化用户注册及试用激活流程的工具。它能解决注册步骤繁琐、流失率高、转化低迷等问题，非常适合需要简化流程、减少阻力并提升注册完成率的业务场景。
